name: Blintz Batter - (Mama Leah Cookbook)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the oil and eggs in a bowl and beat until light and frothy.
2. Beat in milk or water, then beat in flour and optional salt until well blended.
3. Pour the batter into a pitcher, cover, and refrigerate for 10 to 15 minutes, until the flour absorbs liquid and thickens.
4. Place an 8 or 9 inch pan over medium heat. Dip a paper towel into some vegetable oil and lightly grease the pan.
5. When the pan is very hot, quickly pour batter into the center. Swirl the batter quickly to cover the entire surface and rapidly back excess batter into the pitcher using a spatula.
6. Shake the crepe onto a clean tea towel or paper towel.
7. Cover with plastic wrap or damp towel until ready to use. To freeze, place wax paper between layers before wrapping well in foil.
